description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a low stone wall and lush green lawns. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, with a car parked outside and a clear main entrance. The backyard includes a landscaped garden, a swimming pool with a curved shape, a shaded seating area, and a hot tub. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor amenities. The exterior is finished in light gray stone and white plaster, with minimalistic landscaping and a few small trees and shrubs. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor leisure, and contemporary architectural lines.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, stone and white exterior, landscaped garden, pool, and garage. Large windows and open spaces connect indoor and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view shows the driveway, garage, main entrance, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long stone wall, garage, and partial view of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the swimming pool, shaded seating area, hot tub, and extensive backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the garage, driveway, and a clear look at the pool and garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped windows
